codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case15_export_file","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case15_export_file/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"comma","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(ID), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(NAME), '') AS NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(EMAIL), '') AS EMAIL, NULLIF(TRIM(PHONE), '') AS PHONE, NULLIF(TRIM(DEPARTMENT), '') AS DEPARTMENT, NULLIF(TRIM(POSITION), '') AS POSITION, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SALARY), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS SALARY, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(HIRE_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS HIRE_DATE, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case15_export_file","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case15_export_file/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
